game_name: Where in Time Is Carmen Sandiego?

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this educational point-and-click game

special_mechanics.name: Time Travel Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Player uses the Chronoskimmer device to travel through time and space to various historical locations (400 AD to 1950s) following clues to track criminals

special_mechanics.name: Turn-Based Movement System
special_mechanics.description: Game is not action-based; player navigates through menu-driven time travel selections rather than direct character movement physics

tier_notes: Tier 3 - This is an educational adventure/puzzle game without documented physics parameters. The game is point-and-click menu-driven rather than action-based, so traditional movement mechanics (acceleration, gravity, jump physics) do not apply. No technical physics documentation is available in source material.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Where in Time Is Carmen Sandiego? (video game)
